headline: Two tasks due today — 90°F heat arrives Thursday
weather_notes: Water c2/c3/c4 bean beds today — seeds sown 4 days ago are mid-germination and 85°F Tuesday will dry surface soil before sprouts emerge.
Water potato_bags before Tuesday — bag soil dries twice as fast as raised beds; 3 days since last irrigation and 90°F arrives Thursday.
Water e1–e4 tomatoes deeply today — four consecutive 85–90°F days begin tomorrow with zero rain in the 7-day forecast.

surfaced_tasks.title: Mid-season feed — fish emulsion
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due today with strawberries at 37 days actively fruiting — apply on moist soil before Wednesday's 89°F dries the bed.

surfaced_tasks.title: Check blackberry for flower clusters
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due today in year 2 Triple Crown's first fruiting season — confirming flower set now determines whether the plant yields berries this summer.

suggested_tasks.title: Check Amish Paste e1 for suckers
suggested_tasks.description: Amish Paste is indeterminate at 23 days — Wednesday's 89°F will surge lateral growth; pinch suckers now before they exceed 2 inches.
